name: Hamstrings

landmarks.notes: Two functions (knee flexion and hip extension) usually need separate exercises. High-eccentric work (RDLs) causes notable damage; individualize volume. Estimate only.

frequency_notes: ~2x/week; separate a hip-hinge day from a knee-flexion (leg curl) day if volume is high.
training_notes: Train BOTH functions: Romanian deadlifts (hip extension, loaded stretch) and leg curls (knee flexion). Seated leg curls load the lengthened position more than lying/standing.
